name: KakaoPay API
description: KakaoPay developer APIs for one-tap payment, subscription, settlement and certificate authentication.

seo.title: KakaoPay API — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: KakaoPay API: KakaoPay developer APIs for one-tap payment, subscription, settlement and certificate authentication.

when_to_use: One-tap KakaoPay payment integration for Korean app and web checkout
Subscription billing via KakaoPay API for Korean SaaS products
Certificate-based authentication and payment in Korean government services
Settlement and payout API for Korean marketplace platforms using KakaoPay

pros: One-tap payment UX loved by Korean users
Access to Kakao's massive user base
cons: API older and less RESTful than modern peers
review.verdict: Essential for Korean merchants — KakaoPay checkout dramatically lifts conversion versus card-only flows.
review.best_for: Korean e-commerce and SaaS wanting native KakaoPay checkout
review.not_for: Non-Korean merchants or teams without local entity

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
